## Type of change

<!-- Leave and check one of below. It must align with your conventional commit prefix. -->

- [ ] `feat` — new feature
- [ ] `fix` — bug fix
- [ ] `docs` — documentation only
- [ ] `test` — adding or fixing tests
- [ ] `chore` — tooling / misc

## Checklist

- [ ] My commit messages follow [conventional commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/)
- [ ] I added JSDoc type of comments to any new code blocks
- [ ] I did not commit secrets, `.env` files, or credentials
- [ ] `npm test` and `npm lint` succesfully passing
